title: Youtube Poop: Mario Pulls Some Strings
description:
Time has come for a winner.

Ryoko is one tough opponent.

This is the so-called sequel/second part of Mario's chatserver match. I don't think it's better, though.

Annotations swarm in this video.

...so will I make more battle vids?

Only if I get more fight scenes.
